author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: weekdayOrderIndex is repeated in four recurrence/calendar modules: src/core/item/item-format.ts:100, src/cli/commands/create.ts:510, src/cli/commands/update.ts:686, and src/cli/commands/calendar.ts:138. Each copy wraps RECURRENCE_WEEKDAY_VALUES.indexOf(value), making recurrence parsing/serialization/calendar expansion drift-prone. Existing recurrence implementation items are closed, and open pm-why9 covers create/update parser blocks but not the shared item-format/calendar weekday helper.

One shared recurrence weekday ordering helper is exported from the appropriate item/time module; item serialization, create/update parsing, and calendar expansion use it; recurrence ordering behavior stays covered; focused recurrence/calendar tests and pnpm build pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'weekdayOrderIndex RECURRENCE_WEEKDAY_VALUES recurrence weekday order' found only closed recurrence work plus unrelated pm-8fx3; no active exact helper-dedup item.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for recurrence weekday helper

value.author: weekday-order-dedup
value.text: START (weekday-order-dedup sub-agent): Claimed pm-max1. Plan: export a single shared `weekdayOrderIndex(value: RecurrenceWeekday): number` from src/types.ts next to RECURRENCE_WEEKDAY_VALUES (its canonical home, already imported by all 4 sites), then remove the 4 local copies in item-format.ts, create.ts, update.ts, calendar.ts and import the shared one. Will add a focused test since src/types.ts is coverage-gated at 100%. Pure dedup, behavior preserved.

value.author: weekday-order-dedup
value.text:
DONE (weekday-order-dedup sub-agent): Pure dedup complete, behavior preserved.

Helper: exported `export function weekdayOrderIndex(value: RecurrenceWeekday): number { return RECURRENCE_WEEKDAY_VALUES.indexOf(value); }` from src/types.ts (line ~121), immediately after the RECURRENCE_WEEKDAY_VALUES const + RecurrenceWeekday type. Reachable via src/types/index.js barrel, which all 4 call sites already import.

Decision: src/types.ts is the canonical home because it already defines RECURRENCE_WEEKDAY_VALUES/RecurrenceWeekday and all 4 sites already import from ../../types/index.js. No new gated module needed (src/types.ts is in vitest include and previously had zero functions, so its 100% gate now requires the helper to be executed by a test).

Files changed:
- src/types.ts: added the shared helper.
- src/core/item/item-format.ts: added `weekdayOrderIndex` to the existing value import from ../../types/index.js; removed local copy (was ~line 101). Only touched the weekday region + the value-import block; did NOT touch decode/type-import areas.
- src/cli/commands/create.ts: import + removed local copy (was ~line 513).
- src/cli/commands/update.ts: import + removed local copy (was ~line 690).
- src/cli/commands/calendar.ts: import (joined existing RECURRENCE_WEEKDAY_VALUES import) + removed local copy (was ~line 138).
- tests/unit/recurrence-weekday-order.spec.ts: NEW focused spec covering the shared helper (full-week mapping, individual mon=0/sun=6 + indexOf parity, comparator ordering of a shuffled selection).

RECURRENCE_WEEKDAY_VALUES is still used at other call sites in all 4 files, so no unused imports. calendar.ts line ~294 sort uses the helper without a cast (rule.by_weekday is RecurrenceWeekday[]), matching the shared signature.

Verification:
- npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json => exit 0.
- PM_RUN_TESTS_SKIP_BUILD=1 node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- recurrence-weekday-order.spec.ts calendar-command.spec.ts create-command.spec.ts update-command.spec.ts item-format-validation.spec.ts item-format-migration.spec.ts => 6 files / 172 tests passed.

Reports for coordinator: no NEW gated module added (helper lives in already-included src/types.ts), so no vitest.config.ts include line change is required. CHANGELOG ### Changed bullet suggested. Did not run full build/coverage/suite per constraints. Left item open for coordinator to close.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: COORDINATOR VERIFIED 2026-05-24: combined gate green, static gate passed. Dogfooded recurrence weekday sort/dedup on BOTH create (fri|mon|wed -> mon,wed,fri) and update (sun|sat|sun -> sat,sun) plus calendar week expansion — shared weekdayOrderIndex helper behaves identically across all sites.

patch.value: Closed after merged PR #58 (501fb16f) landed the shared recurrence weekday ordering helper, focused tests, manual dogfood evidence, and green GitHub checks; tracker item had remained open after merge.
